name: testVerifyAddBusinessUnitButtonDefaultState
description: Verify 'Add business unit' button is disabled if 'Select company' filter's field is cleaned
descriptionHtml: Verify 'Add business unit' button is disabled if 'Select company' filter's field is cleaned

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Verify 'Add business unit' button is disabled if 'Select company' filter's field is cleaned

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Verify: 'Add business unit' button is disabled once no destination company is selected
